summary: First-iteration end-to-end test of My Finance Book. Backend: 12/14 tests pass; the 2 failing tests are AI endpoints (/api/ai/suggest anthropic and openai) — root cause is Emergent LLM key budget/quota exhausted (litellm error 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'), NOT application code. Frontend: All critical flows verified — cinematic intro, skip-to-login, JWT login, all 6 sidebar nav pages, Income Tax FY selector + regime cards, GST ITC excess Rule 36(4) warning, TDS 20% PAN override, XBRL generator with <in-cca:CorporateIdentityNumber>, portfolio Add/Save round-trip, and logout redirect all working. Auto-transition (8s) verified in code (setTimeout(onEnded, 8000) in Landing.js).

critical.issue: Returns 500 for both anthropic and openai providers due to 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0' from litellm/emergentintegrations. Backend code path is correct — this is an Emergent LLM key quota issue, not an application bug. Both AI Wealth Advisor and Income-Tax AI Review will not work in production until the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY has budget attached.

ui_bugs.issue: Nested <button> inside <button>: the star-watchlist <button data-testid=watch-*> is rendered inside the stock <button data-testid=stock-*> at Investments.js:161-167. This is invalid HTML and triggers a React hydration warning in console. Move watchlist toggle to a <span role=button> / <div onClick> to fix.

Console hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. Comes from framework dev-instrumentation wrapping option children. Consider rendering options with raw string content only (children as string, not JSX span) to silence the warning.
Console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Recharts ResponsiveContainer has no fixed minHeight. Add minHeight/aspect prop or wrap in a sized container.

integration_issues.flow: AI Wealth Advisor & Income-Tax AI Review
integration_issues.issue: Frontend AI panels call /api/ai/suggest which returns 500 (Emergent LLM budget exhausted). User will see 'AI call failed: ...Budget has been exceeded' toast. Not a frontend bug — see backend critical issue.
affected_selectors: AI Review buttons in IncomeTax step 3

action_items: Top-up / provision budget on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (sk-emergent-9B40d0fD87eC4801cA) — currently 'Max budget: 0.0'. Both anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) and openai (gpt-5.2) calls fail with budget error.
Fix nested <button> in Investments.js line 161-167 (watch-* button inside stock-* button) — invalid HTML, hydration warning.
(Optional) Silence Recharts width/height=0 console warnings by ensuring chart containers have explicit min-height.
(Optional) Consider adding /api/ai/suggest graceful degradation on frontend — show a friendly 'AI temporarily unavailable' banner instead of raw 500 error toast.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS middleware is added AFTER app.include_router — while FastAPI usually still applies, best practice is to add CORS BEFORE routers.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — should migrate to lifespan handlers in future.
seed_users() runs unconditionally on every startup — idempotent (checks existence) so OK, but should be gated to non-prod in future.
JWT_SECRET default is committed in .env — fine for preview but must be rotated for prod.
Landing.js Login form pre-fills demo credentials — good for demo, but should be conditional (env flag) before production ship.
Investments.js has nested interactive elements (button-inside-button) — accessibility & HTML validity issue.
All backend endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projections {'_id': 0}. Good.

success_rate.backend: 86% (12/14 — AI calls fail due to LLM quota, not code)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tested flows: intro, skip, login, 6 nav pages, portfolio save/get, logout, IncomeTax FY+regime, GST Rule 36(4) warning, TDS 20% override, XBRL CIN tag)

test_credentials: demo@myfinancebook.in / Demo@123 ; ca@myfinancebook.in / CA@123456 ; admin@myfinancebook.in / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md — all verified working)
seed_data_creation: seed_users() auto-runs on backend startup and inserts the 3 pre-approved users if missing. Portfolio test created TEST_RELIANCE / TEST_INFY holdings for demo user — safe to leave (isolated to demo account).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend & frontend both accessible at https://finance-book-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py runs via `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. All UI critical flows are working. Only unresolved item is AI quota — once EMERGENT_LLM_KEY has budget, re-run TestAI class in test_backend.py to confirm anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) and openai (gpt-5.2) both respond. Nested-button HTML hydration warning in Investments.js is cosmetic (does not break clicks in Playwright but should be fixed for a11y).
rca of the issue: AI endpoint 500: emergentintegrations LlmChat.send_message() -> litellm -> raises BadRequestError 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. The EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in /app/backend/.env is either newly minted with no budget or has been exhausted. Reproduction: `curl -X POST $BASE/api/ai/suggest -H 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"prompt":"hi","provider":"anthropic"}'` → HTTP 500 with body containing 'Budget has been exceeded'. Mitigation: allocate budget to the Emergent LLM key or swap in a funded key; the application code (LlmChat init + with_model + send_message + async handling) is correct and does not need modification.
